'''鈭歝h-f-k''' ('''kachafak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earbash|earbash]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earbash|earbash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kachafak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafak|thichafak]] || [[word:jichafak|jichafak]] || [[word:shichafak|shichafak]] || [[word:kichafak|kichafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchafak|thuthuchafak]] || [[word:jujuchafak|jujuchafak]] || [[word:shushuchafak|shushuchafak]] || [[word:kukuchafak|kukuchafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchafak|thuchafak]] || [[word:juchafak|juchafak]] || [[word:shuchafak|shuchafak]] || [[word:kuchafak|kuchafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchafak|thuchafak]] || [[word:juchafak|juchafak]] || [[word:shuchafak|shuchafak]] || [[word:kuchafak|kuchafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechafak|thechafak]] || [[word:jechafak|jechafak]] || [[word:shechafak|shechafak]] || [[word:kechafak|kechafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochafak|thothochafak]] || [[word:jojochafak|jojochafak]] || [[word:shoshochafak|shoshochafak]] || [[word:kokochafak|kokochafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochafak|thochafak]] || [[word:jochafak|jochafak]] || [[word:shochafak|shochafak]] || [[word:kochafak|kochafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochafak|thochafak]] || [[word:jochafak|jochafak]] || [[word:shochafak|shochafak]] || [[word:kochafak|kochafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chafak|th忙chafak]] || [[word:j忙chafak|j忙chafak]] || [[word:sh忙chafak|sh忙chafak]] || [[word:k忙chafak|k忙chafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachafak|thathachafak]] || [[word:jajachafak|jajachafak]] || [[word:shashachafak|shashachafak]] || [[word:kakachafak|kakachafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachafak|thachafak]] || [[word:jachafak|jachafak]] || [[word:shachafak|shachafak]] || [[word:kachafak|kachafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachafak|thachafak]] || [[word:jachafak|jachafak]] || [[word:shachafak|shachafak]] || [[word:kachafak|kachafak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachafak|shachafak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachafak|goshachafak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachafak|gokishachafak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachafakn眉|shachafakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaknkn眉|goshachafaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafakn眉|gokishachafakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachafaksh毛|shachafaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachafaknksh毛|goshachafaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachafaksh毛|gokishachafaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafakro|shachafakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaknkro|goshachafaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafakro|gokishachafakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafakmu|shachafakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaknkmu|goshachafaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafakmu|gokishachafakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachafaksher|shachafaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachafaknksher|goshachafaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachafaksher|gokishachafaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachafakng|shachafakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachafaknkng|goshachafaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachafakng|gokishachafakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachafakya|shachafakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachafaknkya|goshachafaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachafakya|gokishachafakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachafakyam|shachafakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachafaknkyam|goshachafaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachafakyam|gokishachafakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafakn眉sh毛|shachafakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafaknkn眉sh毛|goshachafaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafakn眉sh毛|gokishachafakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafakn眉ro|shachafakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaknkn眉ro|goshachafaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafakn眉ro|gokishachafakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafakn眉mu|shachafakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaknkn眉mu|goshachafaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafakn眉mu|gokishachafakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafaksh毛n眉|shachafaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaknksh毛n眉|goshachafaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafaksh毛n眉|gokishachafaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafaksh毛ro|shachafaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaknksh毛ro|goshachafaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafaksh毛ro|gokishachafaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafaksh毛mu|shachafaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaknksh毛mu|goshachafaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafaksh毛mu|gokishachafaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafakron眉|shachafakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaknkron眉|goshachafaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafakron眉|gokishachafakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafakrosh毛|shachafakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafaknkrosh毛|goshachafaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafakrosh毛|gokishachafakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafakromu|shachafakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaknkromu|goshachafaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafakromu|gokishachafakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafakmun眉|shachafakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaknkmun眉|goshachafaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafakmun眉|gokishachafakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafakmush毛|shachafakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafaknkmush毛|goshachafaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafakmush毛|gokishachafakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafakmuro|shachafakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaknkmuro|goshachafaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafakmuro|gokishachafakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
